Name: GARAGE_CAMERA_ANIM_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the handling of garage camera animation.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: 0: Start Camera ID
Fields.Description: Camera ID to play at start.

Fields.Name: 0: End Camera ID
Fields.Description: Camera ID to play at end.

Fields.Name: 0: Play Immediately
Fields.Description: Play now or wait for system wait time if not play.

Fields.Name: 0: Fade
Fields.Description: Fade in and fade out according to the camera animation (if there is no animation, the system will process at a fixed time)

Fields.Name: 0: Blur
Fields.Description: Blur according to the camera animation (if there is no animation, process at a fixed system time)

Fields.Name: 0: Cancel Current Playback if Reset
Fields.Description: Do you want to cancel the end playback of this camera before starting playback?

Fields.Name: 0: Is Filter Effects Only
Fields.Description: Only the screen effect animation and the camera animation refer only to the animation frame.

Fields.Name: 0: Is Camera Height Fixed
Fields.Description: Even if the height of the viewpoint dummy poly is moved during animation, it will be the difference from the reference height.

Fields.Name: 0: Lane Camera: Initial Frame
Fields.Description: Initial frame of lane camera animation when switching cameras.

Fields.Name: 0: Base Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Play the camera based on the specified dummy polygon (i.e. playback position offset).

Fields.Name: 0: Lane Camera: Perspective Entity ID
Fields.Description: If the lane camera viewpoint entity ID (value of the last two digits of 101700) is -1, it is the own aircraft.

Fields.Name: 0: Lane Camera: Region Entity ID
Fields.Description: Entity ID referenced by the lane camera point region (value of the last digit of 101600).

Fields.Name: 0: Lane Camera: Viewpoint Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Damipoly ID from the lane camera viewpoint (if -1, damipoly 899 of your own aircraft's head part)
